scope: Official Inbox API endpoint inventory from docs navigation. Current executable coverage remains the existing stream-backed reads for conversations, customers, mailboxes, and users; all other documented operations are tracked as blocked-by-default direct-read, binary, reverse-ETL, admin, or destructive operation rows for follow-up lanes #216-#219.

operation.reason: Deletes Help Scout data or configuration; implement only as a typed reverse-ETL action with destructive confirmation.
Binary or raw-message retrieval needs bounded download/output policy before CLI exposure.
Safe read candidate, but not implemented in this slice; requires bounded direct-read command metadata.
